mxCell.value:
MAIN MENU

1. Create Account
2. Login as Admin
3. Login as Member
4. Exit

Select Year Level
(1st Year IT, 2nd Year IT,
3rd Year IT, 4th Year IT)

ADMIN  MENU


1. Display Books
2. Add books
3. View Reports
4. View Student History
5. View Overdue Books
6. Back to Menu
Do you want to add a new book?

Display:

• Student ID
• Student Name
• Year Level
• Book ID
• Book Title
• Borrow Date
• Due Date

Display Overdue:

• Student ID
• Student Name
• Year Level
• Book ID
• Book Title
• Borrow Date
• Due Date
• Penalty Fee
 (P75 Overdue & 500 Lost/ Damage)

Member Menu

1. Display Books
2. Borrow Books
3. Return Books
4. View Borrow History
5. Back to Main Menu
Invalid input. Please select a valid Year Level.

• Book ID
• Book Title
• Borrow Date
• Due Date
• Penalty Fee

Return Date,
Due Date

You already borrowed Book ID (#). Skipped.

• borrowing_records
• return_records
• penalty_records

• Delete borrowing record
• Increase book quantity
• Insert return record

Return Date,
Due Date

Student_accounts
student_id(PK)
• student_name
• year_level
• password

Student_logs
log_id (PK)
• student_name
• entry_date
• entry_time

Admin_accounts
admin_id (PK)
• username
• password

Book_inventories
book_id(PK)
• title
• year_level
• quantity

Borrowing_records
record_id (PK)
• book_id (FK)
• student_id (FK)
• student_name
• borrow_date
• due_date

Return_records
return_id(PK)
• book_id (FK)
• student_id (FK)
• student_name
• return_date

Penalty_records
penalty_id(PK)
• student_id (FK)
• student_name
• book_id (FK)
• penalty_type
• penalty_amount
• penalty_date
Failed to create account: Duplicate entry 'Student ID' for key 'PRIMARY'
